titleStmt.title: SII 31.111: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 111. (A.R. No. B 237 of 1938.) KAMALĀPURAM, KAMALAPURAM TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the Pātāḷa-Sōmēśvarasvāmi temple.
This is dated Śaka 1475, Prāmādīcha, Āśvīja, śu. 6, corresponding to September 13, Wednesday 1553 A.D.

It records that while the king Śrī Vīrapratāpa Śrī Sadāśivadēva mahārāju was over ruling the country from Vidyānagara, an agreement on the rights and privileges (kāṇāchilu and ōjarikamu) reached between Pedda Mallōju, China Mallōju, the sons of Kōṁḍōju, the agasāla of Kamalāpuram and Pāpōju, the son of Chaḍipirāla Pāpōju and Siddhaya, the son of Ariṁgōju. According to this agreement the rights and privileges of eleven villages viz. Kamalāpuram, Chaḍipirāḷa, Tumdulūru, Yaraguḍipāḍu, Tippalūru, Pāsagulapāḍu, Jammapuram, Pandiḷapalle, Gōmallapalle, Aṁkareḍḍipalle and Agastadēvarapalle, were distributed among the above mentioned persons. It is stated that out of the 5 shares (pālu) collected from the above villages, 3 shares (muḍoṁtudu-pālu) were given to Pōpōju, the son of Tummalūri Būmōju and Koṁdōju, the son of Chaḍipirāla Yarabayivōju equally and the remainding two shares were maintained by the members of above party equally. It is also recorded that some persons (names mentioned) offered one tūmu of wet land for purpose of offerings and worships to the god obviously Pātāḷa-Sōmēśvara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī jayābhyugadaya śālivāhana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1475 Agunēṭi pramādīca saṁvatsara Āśvīja śu 6 lu śrīmadrājādhi
rāja paramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīsadāśivadēvamahārāyalugāru vidyānagaramaṁdu vajrasiṁhāsanārūḍhuṁḍai pṛdhvī
sāmrājyaṁ cēyucuṁḍagānu śrīmatu kāmalāpuraṁ Agasāla koṁḍōju koḍukulu pedamallōju cina mallōju caḍipi
rāla pāpōju koḍuku pāpōjalaku Āriṁggōju koḍuku śidhayakuṁnu yiccina grāmālavāri kaṁma kramameṭlannanu kāmalāpuraṁ caḍipirāla tuṁdulūru ya
raguḍipāḍu tippalūru pāsagulapāḍu jaṁmāpuraṁ paṁdiḷlapalle gomaṁllapalle Aṁko(kā)reḍḍi palle Agastadēvarapalle yīpadakoṁḍu grāmāla kāṇāculuṁnnu Ojarikā
luṁnnu manamu paṁcukoyavivaraṁ . tuṁmmalūri būmōju koḍuku pāpōjunu caḍi pirāla yarabayidoju koḍuku koṁḍōjunu vīri yiddarikiṁnni yāgrāmāla
lōnu mūdorapālu boṁgānu migilina reṁḍu pāḷuṁnnu mīru mayna cerusagamuṁnnu saḍapaṁgalavāru . yadani noppiyiccinakaṁmma . yiṁduku sākṣulu goṁgaḷireḍḍiṁnni
ceṁnnāreḍḍiṁnni peddireḍḍi [I]ṁguvareḍḍinni Anaṁtti(ta)reḍḍiku ciṁreḍḍiṁnniki timala nāgādityareḍḍi vaḍluca batta vu bhaya tārakaṁ rayyakumāru
ṁḍu tiṁmayyavāru grāmapāṭha kaṁmmareḍḍi maṟuciri pedamallōju vrālu cina mallōjuvrālu sākṣulu . goṁgaḷareḍḍi vrālu rācureḍḍivrālu ceṁnāreḍḍi
liṁgāreḍḍigārivopaṁ mahāliṁggaṁ karumala nāgābattuni vrālu pedda rācābattuni vrālu tirumalarāju pillanu gāvuṁḍa paṁḍraṁḍu rāmā
mallōjulu cinamallōjulu pāpōju rājuṁgāru pōtulamīda cellekottakālvunu rānimānni paḍumaṭi tūmeḍunnu sā dasarmana śi
vaku nelāṁgugānu naivēdyaṁ dīpārādhanagānu sarma(piṁ)stimi . Idi yavvaru Āpiṁcinānu tamatalliṁtaṁḍrulunu vāranāśi (vāraṇāsi) lō caṁpina pāpana
pōvuduru . peddamallōju cinamallōju pāpō basvattulu pāpōju koḍuku pāpa batrulunu
nāgābattuḍu cekkina śāsanamu .
Digital edition of SII 31.111 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
